text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo drags me along to practice her peculiar
call and response routine: "What's my name?"
"King Halo!" A bit shameless, but at least she's in
great form.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next stunt involves organizing a press
interview during a training session. However, a
disapproving Air Groove puts a stop to it and
challenges King's actions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like King Halo, Air Groove is the daughter of a
famous racer. She attempts to share some advice,
but King Halo isn't in the mood to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo remains bent on gaining the
recognition of the public—who regards her as
little more than her mother's daughter—and of
her mother herself, who refuses to acknowledge
her daughter's talent.
